title: Stenostelma eustegioides
taxonomy: Stenostelma eustegioides is classified as a species within the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. It belongs to the genus Stenostelma, which is a small group of flowering plants found primarily in Africa. The specific classification of Stenostelma eustegioides is Stenostelma eustegioides (Decne.) Liede & Meve. It is further classified as a member of the tribe Staplieae, which is a group of flowering plants that are mostly found in arid regions. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Stenostelma eustegioides.
